title: Timeseries Matrix Response Payload (v0.1.1)
description: Payload returned by the getTimeseriesMatrix Tauri command.

data.description: Binary data buffer (SAB/ArrayBuffer) containing the timeseries matrix in row-major order. Each row corresponds to one of the requested indices, and each column represents a time point.

shape.description: Dimensions of the returned matrix as [rows, columns]. Rows correspond to the number of indices requested (or 1 if aggregation was used), and columns represent the number of time points in the timeseries.

dtype.description: Data type of the values in the binary buffer. This determines how to interpret the binary data.
